mapper.select:
/* wms-ctmaster-centercode-sql-oracle.xml - selectCenterCodeDtList */ SELECT '0' AS CHK , CH.CTKEY , CT.CTNM , CD.CTCDHDKEY , CD.CTCDDTKEY , CD.LAKEY , CD.CTCDDTORD , CD.CTCDDTNM , CD.CTCDDTVAL , CD.CMT , CD.DELYN
, CASE WHEN NO_TYPE.ORDER_TYPE IS NULL THEN 'N' ELSE 'Y' END ORDER_TYPE_YN , CASE WHEN CD.CTCDHDKEY = 'IBHDTYPE' THEN 'IN' WHEN CD.CTCDHDKEY = 'OBHDTYPE' THEN 'OUT' ELSE null END ORDER_TYPE
, CD.INSERTDATE , CD.INSERTURKEY , CD.UPDATEDATE , CD.UPDATEURKEY FROM TWORK_MST_CTCD_HD CH INNER JOIN TWORK_MST_CTCD_DT CD ON CD.CTKEY = CH.CTKEY AND CD.CTCDHDKEY = CH.CTCDHDKEY INNER JOIN TWORK_MST_CT CT ON CT.CTKEY = CD.CTKEY
LEFT OUTER JOIN TWORK_MST_NORMAL_ORDER NO_TYPE ON NO_TYPE.CTKEY = CD.CTKEY AND NO_TYPE.ORDER_TYPE = CD.CTCDDTKEY AND NO_TYPE.DELYN = 'N'
AND NO_TYPE.IN_OUT_TYPE = 'IN'
AND NO_TYPE.IN_OUT_TYPE = 'OUT'
WHERE CH.CTKEY = #{ctkey} AND CD.CTCDHDKEY = #{ctcdhdkey} AND CH.DELYN = 'N' AND CD.DELYN = 'N' ORDER BY CD.CTCDDTORD ASC
